title: ?author= filter is exact, case-sensitive equality
evidence: src/BookApi/Program.cs:51 uses b.Author == author (SQLite ordinal equality); spec does not require case-insensitive/partial match
suggestion: Optionally support case-insensitive or substring matching for a friendlier filter

title: GET /books has no pagination
evidence: src/BookApi/Program.cs:46 returns the full collection unconditionally; not required by TASK.md
suggestion: Add optional ?limit/?offset if large collections are expected

title: Line coverage 91.34%, not full
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.9134; a few branches (e.g. PUT validation-failure path, EnsureCreated startup) are unexercised
suggestion: Add a PUT-with-missing-title test to cover the update validation branch
